name: /standards-add: when --id is omitted, derives id from URL host + last path segment (kebab-case)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html --tier 1 --applies-to typescript && grep -E "id: google-tsguide" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
